label: trip_01_cheapest_weekend_goa
task: I want to go from Pune to Goa this weekend (Saturday to Monday). Find the cheapest Sleeper class train on Saturday and the cheapest return train on Monday evening. What's my total round-trip train fare?

label: trip_02_fastest_route_delhi_jaipur
task: Compare the fastest train vs fastest bus from Delhi to Jaipur on 5 May 2026. Which mode of transport gets me there sooner and what's the time difference? Check both trains and buses on confirmtkt.

label: trip_03_3day_rajasthan_circuit
task: Plan a 3-day Rajasthan trip starting from Delhi on 10 May 2026. Day 1: Delhi to Jaipur. Day 2: Jaipur to Udaipur. Day 3: Udaipur back to Delhi. Find the best train for each leg (prefer AC classes). List all 3 trains with departure times, durations, and fares.

label: trip_04_overnight_availability_sweep
task: I need to travel from Mumbai to Bangalore next week. Check train availability for Monday, Tuesday, and Wednesday in 3AC class. Which day has the most available seats? List each day's best available train.

label: trip_05_group_travel_options
task: A group of 6 people needs to travel from Chennai to Hyderabad on 15 May 2026. Find a train where 3AC has at least 6 available seats. If no single train works, suggest splitting across two trains departing within 2 hours of each other.

label: trip_06_cheapest_date_search
task: I'm flexible on dates. I want to travel from Kolkata to Delhi sometime between 5-12 May 2026 in 2AC. Check availability across these dates and tell me which date has the cheapest 2AC fare with confirmed seats.

label: trip_07_bus_vs_train_bangalore
task: Compare buses and trains from Bangalore to Chennai on 8 May 2026. For buses, find the cheapest AC sleeper option. For trains, find the cheapest 2AC option. Which is cheaper, which is faster, and which departs at a more convenient morning time?

label: trip_08_multi_city_south_india
task: Plan a South India circuit: Bangalore → Mysore → Ooty → Coimbatore → Chennai, starting 12 May 2026, one day per leg. For each leg, find the best available train or bus (whichever is faster). Give me a full itinerary with times and costs.

label: trip_09_premium_vs_budget
task: For Delhi to Chandigarh on 6 May 2026, compare: (1) Vande Bharat/Shatabdi premium trains with CC class, (2) cheapest Sleeper class option. What's the price difference and time difference between the premium and budget options?

label: trip_10_connecting_train_no_direct
task: Find how to get from Varanasi to Goa by train on 20 May 2026. If there's no direct train, find the best connecting route (e.g., Varanasi→Mumbai→Goa or Varanasi→Pune→Goa). Minimize total travel time.

label: trip_11_flights_to_ixigo
task: I want to compare train vs flight from Delhi to Bangalore on 15 May 2026. First search for the fastest train on confirmtkt. Then click on 'Flights' to go to ixigo and search for flights on the same route and date. Compare the cheapest flight fare with the train 2AC fare.

label: trip_12_hotels_in_goa
task: I'm arriving in Goa on 18 May 2026 by train. First find what time the Mumbai-Goa train arrives. Then click 'Hotels' to go to ixigo and search for hotels in Goa for 18-20 May 2026. Find the cheapest 3-star or above hotel near the station.

label: trip_13_full_trip_cost_shimla
task: Calculate the total trip cost for a 2-day Shimla trip from Delhi starting 10 May 2026. Include: (1) Delhi to Kalka train fare in AC Chair Car, (2) Kalka to Shimla train if available or bus fare. List each leg's cost and total.

label: trip_14_late_night_options
task: I'm finishing a meeting in Pune at 9 PM on 7 May 2026. Find all transport options (trains and buses) departing after 9:30 PM to Mumbai that same night. Which option gets me to Mumbai the earliest?

label: trip_15_family_trip_kerala
task: Plan a family trip (2 adults, 1 child) from Bangalore to Kochi on 22 May 2026. Find a train with 2AC availability. Also check if there's a Vande Bharat on this route. Compare the options and recommend the best one considering comfort and cost.

label: trip_16_golden_triangle_budget
task: Budget the Golden Triangle tour by train: Delhi→Agra (Day 1), Agra→Jaipur (Day 2), Jaipur→Delhi (Day 3), starting 15 May 2026. Use the cheapest available class for each leg. What's the total train cost for 2 passengers across all 3 legs?

label: trip_17_monsoon_konkan_trip
task: Find trains from Mumbai to Ratnagiri on 1 June 2026. Then also search Mumbai to Gokarna. Compare: which Konkan coast destination is easier to reach by train (more direct options, shorter journey, better availability)?

label: trip_18_pilgrimage_circuit
task: Plan a pilgrimage circuit: Delhi → Haridwar → Varanasi → Puri → Delhi, spending 2 days at each stop, starting 8 May 2026. Find the best overnight train for each leg to maximize time at destinations. List all 4 trains with fares in 3AC.

label: trip_19_northeast_adventure
task: How do I get from Kolkata to Gangtok (Sikkim) on 20 May 2026? Search for trains from Kolkata to NJP (New Jalpaiguri) or Siliguri. Find the fastest option and tell me what time I'd arrive, so I can plan a taxi/bus to Gangtok from there.

label: trip_20_optimize_weekly_commute
task: I commute weekly from Pune to Mumbai every Monday morning and return Friday evening. Find the best Monday morning train (arriving Mumbai before 10 AM) and the best Friday evening train (departing Mumbai after 5 PM) for next week. Compare 2AC vs CC fares for both legs and tell me the cheapest weekly commute cost.
